questions.question: Etalin Hydroelectric Project is located in which state?
questions.explanation: Recently, an expert panel of the Union Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change recommended environmental clearance for the 3,087 Megawatt (MW) Etalin Hydroelectric Project. Etalin is a large run-of-river hydro project on the Dri and Tangon Rivers in Arunachal Pradesh’s Dibang Valley. The Dri River meets Mathun, then joins Tangon near Etalin village, after which it is called the Dibang River. The project will build concrete gravity dams to divert water through two separate waterway systems.

questions.question: JP Senani Pension Scheme was launched by which state government?
questions.explanation: The Bihar government has doubled the pension for ‘JP Senanis’, political activists jailed during the Emergency for supporting Loknayak Jayaprakash Narayan’s movement. The decision was approved in a cabinet meeting chaired by Chief Minister (CM) Nitish Kumar. Pension for those jailed over six months is increased from ₹15,000 to ₹30,000 per month. Pension for those jailed less than six months is raised from ₹7,500 to ₹15,000 per month. This adjustment falls under JP Senani Samman Pension Scheme. The scheme was launched by Bihar CM Nitish Kumar in 2009. Currently, 3,354 people receive this pension.

questions.question: Which Union Territory organised the educational and cultural tour ‘Aarohan: Dweep to Delhi’?
questions.explanation: Andaman and Nicobar Command organised a first-ever seven-day educational and cultural tour ‘Aarohan: Dweep to Delhi’ for 30 meritorious tribal higher secondary students. Students were selected by the Directorate of Education from all three districts — North Andaman, South Andaman, and Nicobar group — with equal boys and girls. Many participants experienced air, train, and metro travel for the first time. Visits include Red Fort, India Gate, National War Memorial, Qutub Minar, Taj Mahal, Agra Fort, and modern hubs like Dilli Haat and Connaught Place. A key highlight was witnessing the Prime Minister’s Independence Day address at Red Fort.

questions.question: Antitrisuloides catocalina, that was recently seen in news, belongs to which species?
questions.explanation: Scientists recently recorded the rare nocturnal moth species Antitrisuloides catocalina in Choolannur Peafowl Sanctuary, Palakkad district, Kerala. This is the first time the species has been found in the Western Ghats. It belongs to the genus Antitrisuloides and is part of the Noctuidae family. The genus has only two known species worldwide. The specimen in Kerala was earlier reported only from North-East India.

questions.question: Bandhavgarh Tiger Reserve is located in which state?
questions.explanation: The National Green Tribunal (NGT) recently criticised Madhya Pradesh for allowing the annual Darshan Yatra in the core area of Bandhavgarh Tiger Reserve. Bandhavgarh Tiger Reserve is located in Umaria district of Madhya Pradesh within the Satpura and Vindhya mountain ranges. The name comes from the ancient Bandhavgarh Fort, said to be gifted by Lord Rama to his brother Lakshmana. Bandhavgarh has the highest known tiger density in India and the world.

questions.question: L. Ganesan, who recently passed away, was the governor of which state?
questions.explanation: L. Ganesan, Governor of Nagaland and senior Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) leader from Tamil Nadu, passed away in Chennai on August 15, 2025, at the age of 80. He had earlier served as Governor of Manipur and held additional charge as Governor of West Bengal. He joined the Rashtriya Swayamsevak Sangh (RSS) during school days and became its chief organiser in Tamil Nadu during the Emergency. He was admired for his role in Hindu unity during Meenakshipuram conversions and Mandaikkadu riots. In 1991, he shifted to BJP, serving as Tamil Nadu unit president, general secretary, and later as BJP vice-president. He was elected to the Rajya Sabha from Madhya Pradesh in 2017.

questions.question: Recently, where was the damselfly species named Konkan Shadowdamsel discovered?
questions.explanation: Two new damselfly species, Konkan Shadowdamsel and Crimson Shadowdamsel, have been discovered in the Western Ghats. Konkan Shadowdamsel was found in Sindhudurg, Maharashtra, and Crimson Shadowdamsel in Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala. They belong to the ‘Shadowdamsels’ group, thriving in shaded forest habitats and pristine small streams. Crimson Shadowdamsel has a reddish body, while Konkan Shadowdamsel shows coffee-brown colouration. Shadowdamsels are microendemics of Western Ghats and act as pollution indicators, reflecting forest health. Damselflies are predatory insects of order Odonata, smaller and weaker fliers than dragonflies, found near freshwater habitats.

questions.question: SWAYAM Portal was launched by which ministry?

options.label: B
options.text: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology

options.label: D
options.text: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment

questions.explanation: The Ministry of Education is offering free Artificial Intelligence (AI) courses on the SWAYAM Portal to meet rising AI skill demand. SWAYAM stands for Study Webs of Active–Learning for Young Aspiring Minds. It is India’s own MOOCs (Massive Open Online Course) platform launched in 2017 by the Ministry of Education (MoE). The portal aims to bridge the digital divide for students left out of the digital revolution and knowledge economy. It is an indigenously developed IT platform hosting courses from Class 9 to post-graduation. Courses are interactive, taught by top teachers, and available free of cost to residents in India.

questions.question: According to State Bank of India’s Economic Research Department, which state is the number one in Unified Payments Interface (UPI) usage?
questions.explanation: According to State Bank of India’s Economic Research Department (ERD), Maharashtra is number one in Unified Payments Interface (UPI) usage, followed by Karnataka, Uttar Pradesh, Telangana, and Tamil Nadu. Maharashtra led July 2025 with 9.8% share in transaction volume and 9.2% in value. UPI daily transaction value rose from ₹75,743 crore in January 2025 to ₹90,446 crore in August 2025. PhonePe is the top UPI app, followed by Google Pay and Paytm. SBI is the largest remitter with 5.2 billion transactions, 3.4 times HDFC Bank. UPI share in retail money value rose from 40% in 2019 to 91% in May 2025, showing cash replacement.

questions.question: What is the name of the mobile application recently launched by the Delhi government to register public grievances?
questions.explanation: Recently, the Delhi government launched the “Delhi Mitra” app to register public grievances. The decision was taken in a cabinet meeting chaired by Delhi Chief Minister Rekha Gupta. It will work as a single-window system integrating Delhi Government, Delhi Police, Delhi Development Authority (DDA), Municipal Corporation of Delhi (MCD), New Delhi Municipal Council (NDMC), and Delhi Cantonment. Citizens will receive stage-wise updates of their complaints through messages and can also file complaints via WhatsApp.
